name: Pressure Bomb (Moderate)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

This tightly sealed metal container is filled with highly pressurized gas that can explode to release a powerful shockwave. A pressure bomb deals ] damage and )[bludgeoning]]{2 bludgeoning splash damage}. On a critical hit, the target is knocked .

Small or smaller targets are pushed 5 feet away from you.

You gain a +1 item bonus to attack rolls.
